query: Shohei Ohtani jersey number changes April 2026 Dodgers dates from 42
a_issues: A has only one clearly relevant result: a Yahoo Sports item about Jackie Robinson Day 2026 saying all MLB players wore No. 42 on April 15. It does not mention Shohei Ohtani by his usual Dodgers number, does not explain any other jersey-number change, and the other results are irrelevant or low-reliability for this question (Dodger Stadium tours; Wikipedia season page with noisy/possibly inaccurate user-edited text). So A only weakly supports the answer and lacks the key Ohtani-specific context.
b_issues: B includes lower-reliability sources such as Instagram and Alamy photo captions, plus a Reddit post and a Substack item that are irrelevant. However, it does contain directly relevant evidence: an Alamy caption stating Ohtani wore No. 42 for the Dodgers on April 15, 2026 because all players were honoring Jackie Robinson Day, and an SI item stating Ohtani normally wears No. 17 in MLB but wore No. 16 for Team Japan in the 2026 WBC. The main issue is source quality, not contradiction.
reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it contains the specific facts needed: Ohtani’s normal MLB/Dodgers number is 17, he appeared as No. 42 on April 15, 2026 due to Jackie Robinson Day, and there is also a separate 2026 number change to 16 with Team Japan in the WBC. A only gives the general Jackie Robinson Day No. 42 fact and does not tie it clearly enough to Ohtani’s usual Dodgers number or other number changes. Neither set is perfect, but B provides more of the answerable facts directly.
